name: com.caudio.core
description: A lightweight data-driven audio system for Unity with AudioDatabase, cue playback, mixer control, editor tooling, optional Addressables support, and EditMode tests.

samples.description: A uGUI scene that demonstrates CAudio playback, selection modes, music, looping ambience, spatial playback, follow playback, stop controls, channel controls, cue limits, pool limits, and validation-friendly database setup.
